mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qnas (title, content, author_id, author_name, view_count, route_data, route_name, created_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{authorId}, #{authorName}, 0, #{routeData}, #{routeName}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, author_id, author_name, view_count, route_data, route_name, created_at, updated_at FROM qnas WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE qnas SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
